description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa is upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. It features three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, geometric profile. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either recessed or hidden from view, contributing to its minimalist aesthetic. Three small, light-colored accent pillows are placed on the back cushions, providing a subtle contrast to the dark upholstery.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, upholstered in dark fabric and featuring broad, straight armrests and three accent pillows. Its clean lines and low profile give it a contemporary, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and three accent pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the thickness of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the open end of the chaise lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with three small accent pillows placed on the back cushions; sectional layout with a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden base design, likely block-style supports placed at the corners and possibly along the center for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, with no visible tufting or channeling, supporting three loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
